title: Learning from Home: The Story of Sarah and Ken
passage:
Learning from Home: The Story of Sarah and Ken

Today, many people around the world choose online learning. This means they study at home using a computer instead of going to a real school building. To study online, a student only needs a computer, a tablet, or a smartphone, and a good internet connection.

Sarah is a 12-year-old girl. She lives with her family in a small, quiet village in Canada. The nearest school is fifty kilometers away from her house. Because of this, Sarah does online learning. Every morning, she wakes up at 8:00 AM and has breakfast. At 8:30 AM, she turns on her computer. She watches video lessons from her teachers and does her homework. Her mother helps her with science experiments. Sarah likes online learning because she can study in her comfortable bedroom.

Ken is a 20-year-old man from Tokyo, Japan. He works at a busy supermarket during the day. In the evening, he takes online English classes. He studies for two hours every night, from 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM. He talks to his English teacher using video calls. Ken likes online learning because he can choose his own study time. He can work during the day and learn English at night to get a better job in the future.

Online learning has many benefits. Students do not need to travel by bus or train to school, so they save time and money. They can also learn at their own speed. However, online learning can also have some problems. Sometimes, the internet connection is slow or stops working. Also, some students feel lonely because they cannot play with their classmates during break times.

In conclusion, online learning is a great choice for many different people. It helps young children in small villages and busy workers in big cities get a good education.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why does Sarah do online learning?

options.A: She does not like her teachers.
options.B: The nearest school is very far away.
options.C: She wants to help her mother at home.
options.D: She does not have a school uniform.

questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'The nearest school is fifty kilometers away from her house. Because of this, Sarah does online learning.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What time does Sarah turn on her computer to study?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'At 8:30 AM, she turns on her computer.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Where does Ken work during the day?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'He works at a busy supermarket during the day.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How long does Ken study English every night?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'He studies for two hours every night...'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Sarah's father helps her with science experiments.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Her mother helps her with science experiments', not her father.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Ken wants to learn English to get a better job.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: '...and learn English at night to get a better job in the future.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Ken's English teacher lives in Canada.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that Ken talks to his English teacher using video calls, but it does not say where the teacher lives.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Online learning can help students save money on travel.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Students do not need to travel by bus or train to school, so they save time and money.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Sarah likes studying online because she can use her comfortable ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Sarah likes online learning because she can study in her comfortable bedroom.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Ken talks to his English teacher using ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'He talks to his English teacher using video calls.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Online students do not need to travel by train or ______ to school.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Students do not need to travel by bus or train to school...'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Some students feel ______ because they cannot play with classmates.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Also, some students feel lonely because they cannot play with their classmates...'

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài cho trình độ A1-A2

1. Dạng bài Multiple Choice (Trắc nghiệm): Các câu hỏi ở trình độ này rất trực tiếp. Hãy tìm từ khóa trong câu hỏi (ví dụ: 'Sarah', 'turn on computer', 'supermarket') rồi định vị chính xác dòng chứa từ khóa đó trong bài đọc để chọn đáp án đúng.

2. Dạng bài True/False/Not Given: Đọc kỹ câu nhận định. Nếu thông tin giống hệt trong bài là TRUE. Nếu thông tin bị ngược (ví dụ: bài viết 'mother helps' nhưng câu hỏi ghi 'father helps') thì là FALSE. Nếu bài đọc không nhắc tới chi tiết đó (ví dụ: giáo viên sống ở đâu) thì chọn NOT GIVEN.

3. Dạng bài Sentence Completion (Điền từ): Chú ý giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS - không quá 2 từ). Hãy tìm từ khóa xung quanh chỗ trống trong câu hỏi và đối chiếu với từ gốc trong bài đọc để điền chính xác từ còn thiếu mà không cần thay đổi dạng từ.
